VO_EN: The phone rings at three in the morning.
VO_VI: Dien thoai reo luc ba gio sang.

VO_EN: You reach for it without opening your eyes.
VO_VI: Ban voi lay ma khong mo mat.

VO_EN: The screen is bright enough to hurt.
VO_VI: Man hinh sang den choi mat.
Mot cai ten ban khong luu.
Mot dia chi ban se khong nho.

VO_EN: You sit up in the dark and type two words back.
VO_VI: Ban ngoi day trong bong toi va go lai hai chu.
Ban da lam chuyen nay truoc do.

VO_EN: More times than you'd like to count.
VO_VI: Nhieu lan hon ban muon dem.

VO_EN: Every time you think it'll be the last.
VO_VI: Moi lan ban deu nghi se la lan cuoi.
Nhung khong bao gio la lan cuoi.
No bat dau nhu the nay.

VO_EN: You never step inside operating rooms.
VO_VI: Ban khong bao gio buoc vao phong mo.
Do la tat ca nhung gi ban lam.

VO_EN: Somewhere right now someone is lying in a hospital bed waiting for a kidney that isn't coming.
VO_VI: Dau do luc nay co nguoi dang nam tren giuong benh vien cho mot qua than se khong den.

VO_EN: The waiting list is two years long.
VO_VI: Danh sach cho dai hai nam.

VO_EN: And somewhere else someone is desperate enough to sell one of theirs.
VO_VI: Va o noi khac co nguoi tuyet vong den muc san sang ban di mot qua than cua minh.

VO_EN: That's what a kidney is worth to someone who has nothing left.
VO_VI: Do la gia cua mot qua than voi nguoi khong con gi.

VO_EN: You grow up in a neighborhood where kids don't finish school.
VO_VI: Ban lon len o mot khu pho noi bon tre khong hoc het cap.

VO_EN: Hospital means walking three hours on a dirt road.
VO_VI: Benh vien co nghia la di bo ba tieng tren duong dat.

VO_EN: Your friend broke his wrist falling off a wall when he was nine.
VO_VI: Thang ban gay co tay vi te tuong luc len chin.

VO_EN: Your mother works double shifts at a garment factory.
VO_VI: Me ban lam hai ca o xuong may.

VO_EN: You hear her coughing through the thin walls at night.
VO_VI: Ban nghe tieng ba ho xuyen qua tuong mong moi dem.

VO_EN: She doesn't go to the doctor.
Doctors cost money you don't have.
VO_VI: Bac si ton tien ma ban khong co.

VO_EN: Running errands for a private clinic at the edge of town.
VO_VI: Chay viec cho mot phong kham tu o ria thi tran.

VO_EN: The sign out front says general practice but no one from the neighborhood goes there and the cars in the parking lot have foreign plates.
VO_VI: Bien hieu ghi da khoa nhung khong ai trong xom den do va xe trong bai deu mang bien nuoc ngoai.

VO_EN: The back door has a different lock than the front.
VO_VI: Cua sau co o khoa khac cua truoc.
Ban khong hoi ben trong la gi.
Doi khi goi hang con am.

VO_EN: You carry them close to your chest like someone told you to.
VO_VI: Ban om sat nguc nhu ai do dan.

VO_EN: You get paid more in a week than your mother makes in a month.
VO_VI: Ban kiem mot tuan nhieu hon me lam ca thang.

VO_EN: One day the man at the clinic asks you to sit down.
VO_VI: Mot ngay nguoi dan ong o phong kham bao ban ngoi xuong.

VO_EN: Expensive watch on a wrist that's never done physical work.
VO_VI: Dong ho dat tren co tay chua bao gio lao dong chan tay.

VO_EN: He slides a piece of paper across the table.
VO_VI: Ong ta truot mot manh giay ngang ban.
Khong phai goi hang lan nay.

VO_EN: When someone calls this number you give them an address.
VO_VI: Khi ai do goi so nay ban dua cho ho mot dia chi.

VO_EN: The envelope is thicker this time.
VO_VI: Phong bi day hon lan nay.

VO_EN: You fold it into your jacket pocket.
VO_VI: Ban gap no cho vao tui ao khoac.
Di bo ve nha trong bong toi.

VO_EN: The paper with the number is still warm in your hand.
VO_VI: Manh giay ghi so van con am trong tay ban.

VO_EN: You keep them in different pockets.
VO_VI: Ban de chung trong tung tui khac nhau.

VO_EN: A man flies in from Dubai on a Tuesday. Clean shoes. He pays before he sits down.
VO_VI: Mot nguoi dan ong bay tu Dubai den vao thu Ba. Giay sach. Ong ta tra tien truoc khi ngoi xuong.

VO_EN: His hands don't shake when he writes the number.
VO_VI: Tay ong ta khong run khi viet so.
Nhung chi khi ban o mot minh.

VO_EN: You don't tell him where it comes from. He doesn't ask.
VO_VI: Ban khong noi no tu dau den. Ong ta khong hoi.

VO_EN: A woman from two streets over signs a paper. She asks if it hurts. You say no.
VO_VI: Mot nguoi phu nu cach hai con duong ky giay. Co ay hoi co dau khong. Ban noi khong.
Ban chua bao gio xem ca mo.

VO_EN: You drive one to the clinic in the morning.
VO_VI: Ban cho mot nguoi den phong kham buoi sang.

VO_EN: You drive the other one home at night.
VO_VI: Ban cho nguoi kia ve nha buoi toi.

VO_EN: You never enter the room where it happens.
VO_VI: Ban khong bao gio buoc vao can phong noi no xay ra.

VO_EN: Disposable phones that you replace every two weeks.
VO_VI: Dien thoai dung mot lan thay moi hai tuan.

VO_EN: You buy them in bulk from a market stall three towns over.
VO_VI: Ban mua si tu mot sap cho cach ba thi tran.

VO_EN: The guy behind the counter knows you by now.
VO_VI: Nguoi ban hang da quen mat ban.
Ong ta nghi ban ban lai.
Ban de ong ta nghi vay.

VO_EN: Locations rotate - never the same clinic twice in a row because patterns are what get people caught.
VO_VI: Dia diem luan phien - khong bao gio cung phong kham hai lan lien vi dung quy luat la bi bat.

VO_EN: You learned that from watching the first broker get arrested.
VO_VI: Ban hoc dieu do tu viec nhin nguoi moi gioi truoc bi bat.

VO_EN: He used the same building six times.
VO_VI: Ong ta dung cung toa nha sau lan.

VO_EN: You recruit from neighborhoods like the one you grew up in.
VO_VI: Ban tuyen nguoi tu nhung khu pho giong noi ban lon len.

VO_EN: You know exactly what to say.
VO_VI: Ban biet chinh xac phai noi gi.

VO_EN: The look in their eyes when you mention the money.
VO_VI: Anh mat cua ho khi ban nhac den tien.
Ban nhin di cho khac truoc.

VO_EN: You promise them five thousand dollars.
VO_VI: Ban hua ho nam nghin do.

VO_EN: You know they'll get fifteen hundred.
VO_VI: Ban biet ho se chi nhan mot nghin ruoi.

VO_EN: You tell them kidneys grow back.
VO_VI: Ban noi voi ho than moc lai.

VO_EN: You tell them people have three.
VO_VI: Ban noi nguoi ta co ba qua.

VO_EN: You've heard these lies so many times they almost sound true.
VO_VI: Ban da nghe nhung loi doi nay nhieu den muc chung ghe nhu that.

VO_EN: Because they need to believe you.
VO_VI: Vi ho can phai tin ban.

VO_EN: The third one you don't even think about.
VO_VI: Nguoi thu ba ban con khong nghi den.

VO_EN: By the tenth you've stopped counting.
VO_VI: Den nguoi thu muoi ban thoi dem.

VO_EN: They blur together after a while.
VO_VI: Ho lan vao nhau sau mot thoi gian.

VO_EN: At some point you already have.
VO_VI: Den luc nao do thi ban da thoi roi.

VO_EN: The buyer arrives the same week. Private car.
VO_VI: Nguoi mua den cung tuan. Xe rieng.

VO_EN: He pays a hundred and fifty thousand dollars for a kidney.
VO_VI: Ong ta tra mot tram nam muoi nghin do cho mot qua than.
Nguoi ban nhan mot nghin ruoi.

VO_EN: You don't tell either side about the other's number.
VO_VI: Ban khong noi cho ben nao biet so cua ben kia.

VO_EN: They don't ask where the kidney comes from.
VO_VI: Ho khong hoi qua than den tu dau.

VO_EN: You shake their hand at the door.
VO_VI: Ban bat tay ho o cua.

VO_EN: You handle logistics the way someone runs a shipping company.
VO_VI: Ban xu ly hau can nhu nguoi dieu hanh cong ty van chuyen.

VO_EN: You text when the seller arrives.
VO_VI: Ban nhan tin khi nguoi ban den.

VO_EN: You text when the buyer leaves.
VO_VI: Ban nhan tin khi nguoi mua di.

VO_EN: You never text what happens in between.
VO_VI: Ban khong bao gio nhan ve nhung gi xay ra o giua.
Chi co dieu hang hoa la nguoi.

VO_EN: Sometimes you sit in the car outside the clinic while it happens.
VO_VI: Doi khi ban ngoi trong xe ngoai phong kham trong luc no xay ra.

VO_EN: The air inside gets thick and stale and warm but you sit there because rolling down the window feels like opening something you want to keep sealed.
VO_VI: Khong khi ben trong dac va oi va nong nhung ban van ngoi do vi ha kinh nhu the mo ra thu gi do ban muon giu kin.

VO_EN: Three hours later a text comes through.
VO_VI: Ba tieng sau mot tin nhan den.

VO_EN: The first time you see a seller after the procedure.
VO_VI: Lan dau tien ban thay nguoi ban sau thu tuc.

VO_EN: Gauze taped at the edges already peeling up.
VO_VI: Gac dan o mep da bong len.

VO_EN: Painkillers on the nightstand next to a glass of water nobody poured for them.
VO_VI: Thuoc giam dau tren tab de canh ly nuoc khong ai rot cho ho.

VO_EN: They look smaller lying there than they did standing in your office.
VO_VI: Ho trong nho be hon khi nam do so voi luc dung trong van phong ban.

VO_EN: Their shoes are by the door still laced up.
VO_VI: Giay cua ho van con buoc day de o cua.
Ga trai giuong co mui thuoc khu trung.

VO_EN: You leave fifteen hundred dollars on the table.
VO_VI: Ban de mot nghin ruoi do tren ban.

VO_EN: You count the bills twice before you put them down.
VO_VI: Ban dem tien hai lan truoc khi dat xuong.

VO_EN: Your hands smell like that room for the rest of the day.
VO_VI: Tay ban co mui can phong do suot ca ngay.

VO_EN: Someone asks you once what you do for a living.
VO_VI: Co nguoi hoi ban lam nghe gi.

VO_EN: A woman at a food stall.
VO_VI: Mot nguoi phu nu o quan an.

VO_EN: You eat dinner afterward at a street cart.
VO_VI: Ban an toi sau do o xe hang rong.

VO_EN: A motorbike passes too close and you don't flinch.
VO_VI: Mot chiec xe may luot sat ma ban khong giat minh.
Nhu khong co gi xay ra.

VO_EN: Nobody warns you about the quiet parts.
VO_VI: Khong ai bao truoc cho ban ve nhung phan yem lang.

VO_EN: You're not sure when that started.
VO_VI: Ban khong biet tu khi nao.

VO_EN: Looks like he hasn't eaten in days.
VO_VI: Trong nhu da nhieu ngay khong an.

VO_EN: His collarbone sticks out through his shirt.
VO_VI: Xuong quai xanh nho ra ngoai ao.

VO_EN: He smells like cigarettes and bus exhaust.
VO_VI: No co mui thuoc la va khi thai xe buyt.

VO_EN: He signs the paper without reading it.
VO_VI: No ky giay ma khong doc.

VO_EN: You wait in the car outside.
VO_VI: Ban ngoi cho trong xe ben ngoai.

VO_EN: You count the tiles on the building across the street.
VO_VI: Ban dem gach tren toa nha ben kia duong.
Khong phai de xac nhan thanh toan.

VO_EN: The doctor doesn't call the police.
VO_VI: Bac si khong goi canh sat.

VO_EN: Because you're the one who handles things.
VO_VI: Vi ban la nguoi xu ly moi thu.

VO_EN: The one who makes problems disappear.
VO_VI: Nguoi lam van de bien mat.

VO_EN: Your hand moves to the gear shift.
For half a second your fingers don't grip.
VO_VI: Nua giay nhung ngon tay khong nam duoc.

VO_EN: The streets are empty at this hour.
VO_VI: Duong pho vang vao gio nay.

VO_EN: A dog is sleeping on the median strip.
VO_VI: Mot con cho ngu tren dai phan cach.

VO_EN: Streetlights flash orange across the windshield.
VO_VI: Den duong nhap nhay cam qua kinh lai.
Het cai nay den cai kia.

VO_EN: You don't turn on the radio.

VO_VI: Su im lang du lon roi.

VO_EN: You don't want to know the details.
VO_VI: Ban khong muon biet chi tiet.

VO_EN: You sit in the car for a long time after that.
VO_VI: Ban ngoi trong xe rat lau sau chuyen do.

VO_EN: The windshield fogs up from your breathing.
VO_VI: Kinh lai mo vi hoi tho.

VO_EN: You wipe it with your sleeve.

VO_VI: Ban co the thay hoi tho cua minh.

VO_EN: The parking lot is empty now.
Even the security light is off.
You don't remember the drive home.
VO_VI: Ban khong nho duong ve nha.
Ban tu nhu se dung lai.

VO_EN: You said it out loud once.
VO_VI: Ban noi thanh loi mot lan.

VO_EN: Standing alone in your kitchen at two in the morning.
VO_VI: Dung mot minh trong bep luc hai gio sang.

VO_EN: You try to remember the kid's face.
VO_VI: Ban co nho mat thang nho.
Dieu do lam ban kho chiu.

VO_EN: The difference now is you don't bother with the story anymore.
VO_VI: Su khac biet la ban khong buon ke chuyen nua.
Toi dang giup ca hai ben.

VO_EN: No they would've done it without me.
VO_VI: Ho se lam du khong co toi.

VO_EN: The lies died in that hotel room next to a kid who never woke up and never got to spend his fifteen hundred dollars and never went home to whoever was waiting for him.
VO_VI: Nhung loi doi chet trong phong khach san do canh mot dua tre khong bao gio tinh day va khong tieu duoc mot nghin ruoi do va khong bao gio ve nha voi nguoi dang cho no.
Sau do moi thu tro nen im di.

VO_EN: You walk past a market on the way home.
VO_VI: Ban di ngang cho tren duong ve nha.

VO_EN: Someone is selling mangoes from a wooden cart.
VO_VI: Ai do ban xoai tren xe go.

VO_EN: A kid runs past you laughing.
VO_VI: Mot dua tre chay ngang cuoi.

VO_EN: His shirt has a hole in it.
VO_VI: Ao no bi rach mot lo.

VO_EN: You watch him for a second too long.
VO_VI: Ban nhin no lau hon mot giay.

VO_EN: You try to remember when this stopped feeling wrong.
VO_VI: Ban co nho la tu luc nao cam giac sai trai bien mat.

VO_EN: The woman who runs the stall recognizes you.
VO_VI: Ba chu quan nhan ra ban.

VO_EN: She puts extra rice without asking.
VO_VI: Ba them com ma khong hoi.

VO_EN: The landlord doesn't count it in front of you anymore.
VO_VI: Chu nha khong con dem truoc mat ban nua.

VO_EN: You walk home in the dark.
VO_VI: Ban di bo ve trong bong toi.

VO_EN: Past the pharmacy that's always closed.
VO_VI: Ngang nha thuoc luc nao cung dong.

VO_EN: Past the lot where someone parks a truck that's never moved.
VO_VI: Ngang bai dat co chiec xe tai khong bao gio nhuc nhich.
Khong ai biet ban lam gi.

VO_EN: The apartment is quiet when you get back.
VO_VI: Can ho im lang khi ban ve.

VO_EN: Sit on the edge of the bed.
Your phone is on the nightstand.
You think about the kid at the market.
VO_VI: Ban nghi ve dua tre o cho.

VO_EN: You're already sitting up before you know what woke you.
VO_VI: Ban da ngoi day truoc khi biet cai gi danh thuc minh.

VO_EN: Your eyes don't sting this time.
VO_VI: Mat ban khong cay lan nay.

VO_EN: You already know what it is.
VO_VI: Ban da biet no la gi.
Ban nghi den viec khong nghe.

VO_EN: You think about it for three rings.
VO_VI: Ban nghi trong ba hoi chuong.
